subcodes.first_line: By the Sun! The vain imaginings of bygone peoples have debarred them from the station of divine verses and the Dawning-Place of Names and Attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوهامات قبل عباد را از منزل آیات و مطلع اسما و صفات محروم نموده قسم بافتاب
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @blind imitation [taqlid], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
